headline: Tarik Muharemovic
body: Leeds confirm Bosnia international Tarik Muharemovic has joined from Sassuolo on a five-year contract. £34m fee.⚪️ Ben Jacobs (JacobsBen) Leeds United agree a deal in principle to sign Sassuolo centre-back Tarik Muharemović. Fee for the Bosnia international is in the region of £34m.🇧🇦 —
raw_text:
Leeds confirm Bosnia international Tarik Muharemovic has joined from Sassuolo on a five-year contract. £34m fee.⚪️




Ben Jacobs (@JacobsBen)

Leeds United agree a deal in principle to sign Sassuolo centre-back Tarik Muharemović. Fee for the Bosnia international is in the region of £34m.🇧🇦





— https://nitter.net/JacobsBen/status/2077119346996895843#m
